title: Gooey American Pasta Lasagna
description: A classic American dish featuring layers of pasta, meat sauce, and melted cheese, perfect for meal prep and satisfying your umami cravings.
instructions: Combine 00 flour and salt in a mixing bowl. Add egg and mix until dough forms. Knead dough for 10 minutes.
Roll out dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch. Place in a baking dish and set aside.
Cook pasta according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add garlic and onion and cook until softened. Add ground beef and cook until browned, breaking into small pieces.
Add tomato sauce, sugar, and basil to the skillet. Stir to combine and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to low and let sauce simmer for 10 minutes.

Spread a layer of meat sauce on the bottom of the baking dish. Arrange a layer of pasta on top of the sauce. Sprinkle with a layer of mozzarella cheese and a layer of parmesan cheese. Repeat the layers until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
Cover baking dish with aluminum foil and bake at 375°F for 30 minutes. Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Let lasagna rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving
